purpose: Compact UI reference for designers and frontend devs

tokens.font: Plus Jakarta Sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif

layout.sections: full-bleed, min-h-screen; responsive typography via clamp()

components.name: FlowArt
components.description: Scroll-driven container that pins sections and manages GSAP ScrollTrigger animations

components.name: FlowSection
components.description: Full-screen panel used inside FlowArt; accepts inline style for background and color

integration_steps: Create /components/ui and copy component code from BuildDocs/UI.md
Extend Tailwind globals: import tailwindcss and tw-animate-css and set --font-sans
Replace demo image placeholders with Unsplash assets
Test responsive typography and reduced-motion preference
